title: Filipino Sirloin Steak Tips Skewers
description: A flavorful and juicy Filipino dish featuring sirloin steak tips, perfect for brunch, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients and a fun twist on traditional skewers.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the sirloin steak tips onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, ginger paste, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Add the skewers to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the skewers from the marinade and grill for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit for medium-rare.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
